method.name: get_bits_per_component
method.description: Gets the number of bits used to describe each color component.

method.name: get_color_space
method.description: Gets the name of the image's color space. Possible values: "", "DeviceGray", "DeviceRGB", "DeviceCMYK", "Indexed".

method.name: get_height
method.description: Gets the height of the image of an image object.

method.name: get_size
method.description: Gets the size of the image of an image object.

method.name: get_width
method.description: Gets the width of the image of an image object.

method.name: set_color_mask
method.description: Sets the transparent color of the image by the RGB range values. The color within the range is displayed as a transparent color. The Image must be RGB color space. Values need to be between 0 and 255. Error codes - EC_INVALID_IMAGE - An invalid image handle was set. - EC_INVALID_COLOR_SPACE - An image other than RGB color was specified. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PARAMETER - An invalid value is specified.

method.name: set_mask_image
method.description: Sets the mask image. Error codes - EC_INVALID_IMAGE - An invalid image handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.
